title: Combat Effects
description: Allows to apply effects when entities engage combat, highly customizable with regex support.
body:
![Banner of the mod](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/main/desc/combat_effects/combat_effects_banner.png?raw=true)

A modpack utility mod that allows applying effects when entities engage in combat. Supports regex!

This can be useful for things such as:

  • Applying a specific effect while fighting bosses
  • Applying poison/bleeding on hit for certain entities
  • Applying an effect (e.g., glow) when players engage in PvP
  • Anything else involving applying effects while in combat
## Config Preview ![Config of the mod](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/main/desc/combat_effects/combat_effects_config.png?raw=true)
